title: 133  How to attain firm faith in Krishna
speaker: HH Stoka Krishna Maharaj

segments.text: How to achieve this faith?
Draupadi, when she was insulted in the open assembly, she had her husband there.
No one could protect her.
She simply called out her beloved Lord with rapt attention and the Lord appeared to protect her.
So, it depends on our faith and our surrender to invoke the mercy of the Lord.
And how to achieve this firm faith in Krishna?
That is explained in Bhagavad Gita.
So here, in Chapter 4, Krishna explains,
A faithful man,
who is absorbed in transcendental knowledge
and who subdues his senses,
quickly attains the supreme spiritual peace.
So, Shraddhaval, Shraddhavan means a faithful man.
How to become a faithful man on Lord Krishna?
So, in the purport, Prabhupada very nicely explains,
Such knowledge in Krishna consciousness can be achieved by a faithful person who firmly believes in Krishna.
One is called a faithful man,
who thinks that simply by acting in Krishna consciousness,
he can attain the highest perfection.
Just we have to think like this,
simply by acting in Krishna consciousness,
I will attain highest perfection.
This much we have to think.
This faith, how to achieve this faith?
This faith is attained by discharge of devotional service
and by chanting Hare Krishna Hare Krishna Krishna Krishna Hare Hare,
Hare Rama Hare Rama Rama Rama Hare Hare,
which cleanses one's heart of all material dirt.
Over and above this, one should control the senses.
A person who is faithful to Krishna and who controls the senses,
can easily attain perfection in the knowledge of Krishna consciousness without delaying.
So here, three things are there.
One thing is,
one has to discharge devotional service.
One has to execute services to the Lord for His pleasure.
The mission of the Lord is here going on.
We are all preaching to people about Krishna consciousness.
The message is very simple.
Krishna is the Supreme Lord.
We are all His parts.
We are all His eternal servants.
And it is our natural duty to surrender unto Him
and be under His care and protection.
This is the message which we have to spread to everyone.
This is the mission going on.
So, to spread this message,
we require men,
we require land,
we require wealth,
we require everything,
which any organization requires.
So anyone who supports the cause of this mission
is discharging devotional service.
So one has to execute devotional service to the Lord
and then chant the holy name of the Lord,
especially the Hare Krishna mantra regularly.
And then,
over and above this,
one has to control his senses.
These are the three things we have to do.
This is from our side.
So controlling the senses means,
as discussed,
we have to be purified in eating.
Eating we have to eat,
but we have to eat only prasadam.
Eating, sleeping, mating, defending,
all these things comes under controlling the senses.
So Srila Prabhupada has given us the four regulative principles.
No meat eating.
No intoxication.
No illicit sex.
And no gambling.
These are the four no's.
And then finally,
chant 16 rounds of the Hare Krishna mantra.
That's all.
If we do this much,
chanting the holy names of the Lord,
this is the do,
and give up the four pillars of sinful activities,
then Prabhupada guarantees that in this life,
we will go back to God.
There is no doubt about this.
